gene_track_color_by_cds.name: gene_track_color_by_cds
gene_track_color_by_cds.note: INVESTIGATED + DEFER recommended: coloring the reference-sequence translation rows by a gene tracks CDS frame is a LARGE architectural change. drawTranslationRow (sequence plugin) colors purely from the seq tracks own theme palette.frames; the sequence display has no access to other tracks features and the render state passes no feature data. Making translation follow CDS membership requires breaking seq/gene track isolation and querying a sister gene track at layout time — a real feature, not a spec tweak. gene_track_peptides remaining item is the same ask.

gene_track_mature_peptides.name: gene_track_mature_peptides
gene_track_mature_peptides.note: DONE (re-review): matureProteinRegion glyph now emits floatingLabelsData (collectRenderData.ts processMatureProteinLayout), mirroring the transcript path — so subfeatureLabels now works for mature peptides. Spec sets subfeatureLabels:overlay; each peptide bar is labeled with its GFF product (VP0, VP1, 2A, 2C, 3C, 3D-POL...). Added unit tests in matureProteinRegion.test.ts. Verified in regenerated screenshot.

rnaseq/single_read.name: rnaseq/single_read

sv_cgiab/deletion_sv_inspector_search.name: sv_cgiab/deletion_sv_inspector_search
sv_cgiab/deletion_sv_inspector_search.note: DONE (re-review): root-cause bug fixed. SpreadsheetDataGrid read the visible-rows lookup synchronously in onFilterModelChange, but MUI X recomputes it only on the later filteredRowsSet event — so the lookup was the PRIOR filter ("never updates on the first filter"). visibleRows never reflected the filter, so the circular view never filtered. Now subscribes to filteredRowsSet. New regression test in SVInspectorFiltering.test.tsx drives the actual quick-filter input (fails on old code, passes now).

sv_inspector_importform_filtered.name: sv_inspector_importform_filtered
sv_inspector_importform_filtered.note: DONE (re-review) for the filtering bug: same fix as deletion_sv_inspector_search — column filters like CHR2=17 and the quick-filter search both flow through the filter pipeline -> filteredRowsSet, so the circular view now filters. SEPARATE open design question (not a bug): you noted CHR2=17 is a limited concept (wont catch variants originating from 17) and a more expressive SV search language could be worthwhile — left for your call.
